final:
// // This module controls the fan speed based on temperature readings. It outputs a 2-bit fan speed value. When the enable signal is high, the fan speed is determined by the temperature. However, when the enable signal is low, the fan speed is set to 11 (High). The controller operates on the falling edge of the clock signal.
module fan_speed_controller(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    input [2:0] temperature,
    output reg [1:0] fan_speed
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (!enable) begin
            fan_speed <= 2'b00;  // Fan off
        end else begin
            case (temperature)
                3'b000, 3'b001, 3'b010: fan_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
                3'b011, 3'b100, 3'b101: fan_speed <= 2'b01; // Low
                3'b110, 3'b111: fan_speed <= 2'b10;        // Medium
                default: fan_speed <= 2'b00;                // Off
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module controls the fan speed based on temperature readings. It outputs a 2-bit fan speed value. When the enable signal is high, the fan speed is determined by the temperature. However, when the enable signal is low, the fan speed is set to 11 (High). The controller operates on the falling edge of the clock signal.
